name: ProfileSelectionForm
summary: The ProfileSelectionForm class represents a dialog to select profiles using the profile catalogs.

constructors.name: ProfileSelectionForm(List<LibraryProfileItem>, List<ParametricProfileItem>)
constructors.summary: Creates a new instance of the ProfileSelectionForm.

params.name: LibraryProfiles
params.doc: The library profiles to be added to the dialog.

params.name: ParametricProfiles
params.doc: The parametric profiles to be added to the dialog.

constructors.name: ProfileSelectionForm(List<LibraryProfileItem>, List<ParametricProfileItem>, String)
constructors.signature: public ProfileSelectionForm(List<LibraryProfileItem> LibraryProfileItems, List<ParametricProfileItem> ParametricProfileItems, string Profile)
constructors.summary: Creates a new instance of the ProfileSelectionForm selecting the given profile in the tree control.

params.name: LibraryProfileItems
params.doc: The library profiles to be added to the dialog.

params.name: ParametricProfileItems
params.doc: The parametric profiles to be added to the dialog.

params.name: Profile
params.doc: The profile that will be selected in the tree.
